channel.title: Deep Learning on Etsub Feleke
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on Etsub Feleke

item.title: Deja Vu: Near-Duplicate Video Detection with Deep Learning
item.description: For my Deep Learning course, I built a near-duplicate video detection system using CLIP and ResNet-50. This post documents the process of figuring out how to catch re-uploaded banned videos, even after edits like cropping, overlays, and reaction layouts.
